raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo es sinnu/ kahdas Doh-
mas es pahr jums dohmaju/ tak-
ka tas KUNGS: Dohmas ta
Meera/ un ne ta Launuma/ ka
e es jums dohdu to pagaiditu
Gallu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad juhs manai peefank-
feet/ un staigafeet / un peeluhg-
feet manni/ un es gribbu juhs
paklaufiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un juhs meklefeit/ un at-
raffeet manni / kad juhs pehz
mannim waizafeet no wiffas
juhas Sirđs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es tapťhu no juhs
atrasts / sakka tas KUNGS:
Un nogreesischu juhsu Zeetumn/
un fapulzinafchu juhs no wiſahm
Tautahm/ un no wiſahm Wee-
tahm/ kurp es juhs efinu is-
dinnis/ sakka tas KUNGS:
Un weddichu juhs attat uhs to
Weetu/ no kurrenes es juhs efinu
lizzis aiswest.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ka juhs sakkat:
Tas KUNGS irr mums eeksch
Babeles Pratweefchus eezehlis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nu/ ta sakka tas
KUNGS no ta Kehnixa/ kas
uhs Dahwida Gobda-Krehtlu
fehsch/ un no wiſfeem Laudim/
kas schai Pilsfahta dsihwo/ us
juhfeem Brah-teem/ kas no juhs
ne irr Zeetumā gabjufchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta sakka tas KUNGS
Zebavt: Raugi / Es fuhtischu
starp winneem to Sohbinn /
Baddu un Mehri/ un darriſchu
tohs/ ka tahs nelabbas Wihges/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es dsibſchohs teem
pakkat ar Sohbina / ar Badda/
un ar Mehra/ un nodohschu tohs
eeksch Nenostah-chanas wiſfahm
Semmes Walſitbahm/ par Lah-
stu/ par Pohſtifchanu / un par
Apsmeekli / un par Neewascha-
nu starp wiſfahm Tautahm/
kurp es tohs nodsihschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Par to/ ka tee manneem
Wahrdeem ne irr klausijschi/ faſ-
ka tas KUNGS: Kad es tawus
Kalpus tohs Praweeschus pee
Laika uhs teem fuhtiju/ bet juhs
ne effat klausijschi / sakka tas
KUNGS:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Juhs tad klaufajt ta
KUNGA Wahrdiu/ juhs wiſti/
kas juhs effat aiswesti/ ko es no
Jerusalemes uhs Babeli efmu
fuhtijs:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta sakka tas KUNGS
Zebaot / tas Israēta Deews:
Prett Akabu Kolajus Dehtu/ un
prett Zedektju Masejus Deht-
lu/ kas jums eeksch manna Wahr-
da Mellus fluddina. Reds/ es
nodohschu tohs NebukadNeza-
xam/ tam Kehnikam no Babe-
les Rohkā/ tas nosittihś tohs
preeksch juhſahm Azzim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un no teem taps Lahsti
darriti pee wiſfeem Aiswesteem
no Juhda/ kas Babelē irr/ un
taps fazzihś: Lai tas KUNGS
tew darra ka Zedekijum/ un ka A-
kabam/ ko tas Kehnisch no Ba-
vels pee Ugguns zeppe.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
